title: 2017 Toyota SiennaLE AWD | AWD | HEATED SEATS | ROOF RAILS |
description: The 2017 Toyota Sienna LE AWD is a versatile and family-ready minivan that delivers comfort, capability, and year-round confidence. Powered by a dependable 3.5L V6 engine paired with a smooth 8-speed automatic transmission, this Sienna offers strong performance while maintaining a comfortable, quiet ride. Its All-Wheel Drive system provides added traction and stability in rain, snow, and changing road conditions, giving you peace of mind no matter the season. Inside, the spacious cabin is designed with convenience in mind, featuring heated front seats for cold mornings, tri-zone automatic climate control, and flexible seating to accommodate passengers and cargo with ease. The power sliding rear doors make loading up the family simple, while the touchscreen infotainment system with Bluetooth connectivity and a backup camera add modern convenience and safety. On the exterior, factory roof rails enhance both style and functionality, allowing you to add extra cargo options for road trips and weekend adventures. Known for its reliability and practicality, the 2017 Toyota Sienna LE AWD is an excellent choice for families seeking comfort, safety, and all-weather capability in one well-equipped package. VISIT TOYOTA DARTMOUTH TODAY TO SEE THIS GREAT CAR FIRSTHAND!

title: 2020 Mazda CX-5GX
description: The 2020 Mazda CX-5 GX with 74,967 km has been reconditioned with an oil and filter change, four-wheel brake service, a new cabin air filter, and an alignment check. This Front Wheel Drive compact SUV is powered by a 2.5L SKYACTIV-G DOHC 16-Valve I4 paired with a 6-Speed SKYACTIV-Drive Automatic transmission with manual shift mode, offering straightforward performance and efficiency for daily driving. Finished in Snowflake White Pearl with a black interior, the GX trim provides practical features including cloth upholstery, heated front bucket seats, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration, a backup camera, heated exterior mirrors, and LED low and high beam headlights. The vehicle reports a clean accident history and service records are available. It has completed a full mechanical inspection, brake and tire measurements, a certified technician road test, and professional interior and exterior detailing in line with Steele Auto Group's reconditioning standards. If you are comparing compact SUVs and want a well-maintained 2020 Mazda CX-5 GX Front Wheel Drive with documented service history, we invite you to book a viewing and test drive to evaluate it in person.
